method: Static snapshot from FedScope Employment cube. SOC-mapped headcount aggregated across agencies that own each workload. Quantitative absorption classification derived from FY-over-FY FTE delta.

primary_agencies: State agency staff funded via federal pass-through
snap_eligibility.note: Includes federal-only headcount; state SNAP eligibility workers (~50K) are funded through federal grants but not on federal rolls.
snap_eligibility.source: OPM FedScope Employment Cube, Sep 2024 (static snapshot)

unemployment_claims.note: Federal staff at DOL ETA only. State UI adjudicator headcount (~28K) is reported separately and funded via federal grants.
unemployment_claims.source: OPM FedScope Employment Cube, Sep 2024 (static snapshot)

call_center_triage.note: Federal CSR headcount across the four highest-volume call-center agencies. SSA dominates (~31K).
call_center_triage.source: OPM FedScope Employment Cube, Sep 2024 (static snapshot)

document_summarization.note: Closest federal SOC for document-intensive casework. Excludes attorneys (23-1011).
document_summarization.source: OPM FedScope Employment Cube, Sep 2024 (static snapshot)

it_help_desk.note: Tier-1 federal civilian help desk. Decline reflects unfilled vacancies, not formal eliminations.
it_help_desk.source: OPM FedScope Employment Cube, Sep 2024 (static snapshot)

foia_processing.note: FOIA-specific FTE only — federal agencies' Government Information Specialists (1410 series) plus attorney detail; broader 23-1011 federal lawyer headcount is much higher.
foia_processing.source: OPM FedScope Employment Cube, Sep 2024 (static snapshot)

primary_agencies: State agency staff funded via federal pass-through
uscis_form_intake.note: Includes federal-only headcount; state SNAP eligibility workers (~50K) are funded through federal grants but not on federal rolls.
uscis_form_intake.source: OPM FedScope Employment Cube, Sep 2024 (static snapshot)

irs_notice_generation.note: IRS tax examiners and revenue agents. Decline reflects FY2024 IRS staffing recalibration after the IRA-funded buildout.
irs_notice_generation.source: OPM FedScope Employment Cube, Sep 2024 (static snapshot)

va_appointment_scheduling.note: Federal CSR headcount across the four highest-volume call-center agencies. SSA dominates (~31K).
va_appointment_scheduling.source: OPM FedScope Employment Cube, Sep 2024 (static snapshot)
